creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #9)
> It looks like you have not upgraded GCC to gcc-12.2.0_7, have you?

I had gcc12 installed, but the DEFAULT_VERSIONS still listed version 11 as the default for gcc.

> ISO_Fortran_binding.h is required to get these interfaces.

In order to obtain a build-log for you, I just rebuilt the port from scratch -- and can no longer reproduce the problem. Sorry for the noise...
